mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_POPUP_ZONE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT homepage_id, popup_zone_idx, popup_zone_name, popup_zone_seq, use_yn, content, add_date, start_date, end_date, img_file_name, real_file_name, file_extension, file_size, link_url, link_target, popup_zone_type FROM CMS_POPUP_ZONE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND popup_zone_idx = #{popup_zone_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_POPUP_ZONE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND popup_zone_idx = #{popup_zone_idx}
